name: do-it
description: Installable AI coding workflow for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode with risk-based routing, scoped sub-agents, and evidence-backed completion.

interface.longDescription: Install do-it via the Codex plugin marketplace. Skills cover route, code-quality, review, decide, and verify. Plugin-bundled hooks enforce quality lint and verification; trust them in /hooks after install.
defaultPrompt: Use do-it-router to pick Light/Standard/Heavy, then self-select meaning skills.
Write with do-it-code-quality (premise, blast radius, bounded chain).
Review with do-it-review; close with do-it-verify.
